title: Add Store Image Designer to Creative
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Open for business
gist.blurb: Store Image Designer has joined the hive! A new tool for crafting perfect assets for your digital storefronts.
gist.summary: Added Store Image Designer to the Creative category, enabling users to generate and customize professional assets for online shops.
gist.impact: Creators can now design high-quality store images and screenshots directly within the platform ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy digital main street. The bee mascot is setting up a glowing shop window display, representing the 'Store Image Designer'. The window features pixelated screenshots or art assets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot arranging a glowing digital shop window display. The window frame is accented in lime green (#ecf874). A small robot helper holds a pixelated paintbrush nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'SHOP'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
